statement.en: Single Molecule Conductance and Surface Electrochemical Characterisation of Molecular Monolayers

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a 2026-dated thesis abstract (future/provisional document) in experimental materials chemistry/electrochemistry, not yet published or validated. The categorization as 'cs.AI' appears to be a metadata error. The work describes empirical measurement protocols and characterization techniques—inherently requiring experimental validation before truth-claims can be established. Status: preprint/thesis-under-review.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 分子の導電率は表面積の幾何学的減衰と電位の位相の絡み合いで浮かぶ
